title: Warm Spicy Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A romantic Malaysian dish featuring spicy chicken, cream cheese, and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a night in with a loved one, this halal-friendly recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, curry powder, cumin, cayenne pepper, and salt.
Add the chicken to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a small saucepan, heat the peanut oil over medium heat.
Add the ferment-kimchi to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the cream cheese to the saucepan and stir until melted and smooth.
Serve the grilled chicken with the spicy kimchi cheese sauce and a squeeze of lemon juice.
